summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing for Talentiv Jobs. Backend: 33/35 API tests passed. Frontend: Homepage, job search, job detail, auth flows, candidate/employer dashboards all loading correctly. Fixed 1 critical backend bug (recommendations endpoint). Minor frontend testid inconsistencies found.

fixed_bugs.issue: MongoDB query error: 'cannot nest $ under $in' - incorrect regex syntax in skill matching
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Changed from nested $regex inside $in to $or with multiple $regex conditions

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 when employer tries to update application status for job not owned by their company
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - role enforcement working correctly. Test used wrong employer account.

testid_inconsistencies.issue: Test looked for 'hero-search-input' but actual testid is 'hero-search-keyword-input'

passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint
Backend: GET /categories returns 6 categories with image_url
Backend: GET /jobs returns 12 jobs with pagination
Backend: Job filtering by query, location, category works
Backend: GET /jobs/featured returns enriched jobs with company info
Backend: GET /jobs/{slug} returns full detail with company + related jobs
Backend: POST /auth/register creates candidate with JWT token
Backend: POST /auth/register with employer role creates company
Backend: POST /auth/login works for candidate and employer
Backend: GET /auth/me returns user+profile for candidate, user+company for employer
Backend: AI salary prediction returns realistic IDR amounts
Backend: AI match score returns score 0-100 with rationale and skills
Backend: AI resume parsing returns structured profile JSON
Backend: Candidate can apply to job with match_score computed
Backend: Candidate can save/unsave jobs
Backend: Candidate can update profile headline/skills
Backend: GET /candidate/stats returns counts
Backend: GET /candidate/recommendations returns jobs (FIXED)
Backend: Employer can create/update/delete jobs
Backend: Employer can view their jobs and stats
Backend: Employer can view applicants sorted by match_score
Backend: Role enforcement - candidate cannot POST /jobs (403)
Backend: Role enforcement - employer cannot POST /applications (403)
Frontend: Homepage loads with hero headline 'Punya skill tapi tetap belum dapat kerja?'
Frontend: Homepage shows 6 category cards with images
Frontend: Homepage shows featured jobs section
Frontend: Homepage shows akselerasi karier section (bootcamp + sertifikasi)
Frontend: Homepage has footer
Frontend: Job search page /lowongan loads with filter sidebar
Frontend: Job search page shows 12 job cards
Frontend: Job search filters (keyword, location, category, etc.) work
Frontend: Job detail page loads with breadcrumb, apply button, save button, salary insight
Frontend: Login page /masuk has form elements
Frontend: Login with kandidat@talentiv.id redirects to /kandidat dashboard
Frontend: Candidate dashboard shows stats and recommendations
Frontend: Candidate profile page /kandidat/profil loads
Frontend: Candidate applications page /kandidat/lamaran loads
Frontend: Candidate saved page /kandidat/tersimpan loads
Frontend: Login with hr@nusantaratech.example.com redirects to /employer dashboard
Frontend: Employer post job page /employer/lowongan/baru loads with AI salary helper
Frontend: Signup page /daftar loads with role tabs (Kandidat vs Perusahaan)
